assertions.text: All items cross safely without being eaten.
assertions.evidence: The sequence prevents the wolf/goat or goat/cabbage pairings from being left alone on either bank.

assertions.text: The farmer takes the goat first.
assertions.evidence: Step 1 explicitly states 'Take the goat across'.

assertions.text: The solution consists of exactly 7 crossings.
assertions.evidence: The provided steps enumerate exactly 7 trips across the river.
